title: Jimboman
compiled_truth: Jimboman is an external contact at [Bigfoot](companies/bigfoot). Over the corpus period (2000-06-19 to 2002-02-25), Jimboman sent 8 and received 57 emails, totalling 65 interactions. Top correspondents: [Michelle Lokay](people/michelle-lokay) (6), [Mlokay](people/mlokay) (2).
